violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Hotel pans labeled "Brisky" & S. Burro: dated:12/3/25 & 12/1/25.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware-washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine not maintaining proper chemical sanitizing concentrations.--Wash water for mechanical ware-wash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. Hot water at dish machine: 100 degrees F. On-demand water heater located on other side of establishment and unable to provide dish machine with adequate hot water.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Queso and sauces on right side of steam table not maintained at proper temperatures. Temping at 112 degrees F.
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
